ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "site_url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme associated with the site */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template associated with the site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the site was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the site was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the theme is the default */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to a preview image of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the design element */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of design element (e.g., typography, color) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the design element was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the design element was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the design element is the default */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the design element (e.g., typography, color, layout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "typography" (
  "typography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each typography setting */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website this typography setting belongs to */,
  "font_family" TEXT /* Font family used in the typography setting */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Font size used in the typography setting */,
  "line_height" REAL /* Line height used in the typography setting */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design element for this typography */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the typography setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the typography setting was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this typography is the default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("typography_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_typography_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_typography_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES design_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color scheme */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website this color scheme belongs to */,
  "color_hex" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "color_rgb" TEXT /* RGB code of the color */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design element for this color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color scheme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color scheme was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this color is the default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES design_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "navigation_menus" (
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each navigation menu */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website this navigation menu belongs to */,
  "menu_name" TEXT /* Name of the navigation menu */,
  "menu_items" TEXT /* List of menu items in the navigation menu */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design element for this navigation menu */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the navigation menu was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the navigation menu was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this navigation menu is the default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_menus_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES design_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_menus_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme associated with the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the template is the default */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to a preview image of the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_design_elements" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design element used in the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id", "element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_customizations" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being customized */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the customization */,
  "customization_type" TEXT /* Type of customization (e.g., typography, color) */,
  "customization_value" TEXT /* Value of the customization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customization was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id", "user_id", "customization_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_performance" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being tracked */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., page views, bounce rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id", "metric", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id", "user_id", "collaborator_id")
)
